Future Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.text: David:  Been with firm 12 years,  "I've built 100's of homes, 1000's of lots.  I'm a Developer and Builder."  Glen (engineering background, development background, etc.  Talk about what he's built at Mountain House."  Maximum Impact.  Minimize words, maximize impact.

UTIMCO - Hedge Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.author: Tony Avila
UTIMCO - Hedge Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.text: Matt Saverin listened to a call between Jared and his boss.   Jared's boss expressed concern about this being an income play.  At some point, things will go south, and then this becomes a loan-to-own play.  Need to emphasize why we don't think this will happen.  (Get Anthony funnel).
